title: Share your ideas about East Adams redevelopment at upcoming Syracuse planning meeting
summary: The Syracuse Planning Commission is hosting a public meeting on Monday at 6 p.m. to gather community input on the East Adams neighborhood redevelopment project. This represents a transparent community engagement opportunity for a significant land-use initiative in the city.

political_signal.description: Public meeting announcement signals openness to community input on neighborhood redevelopment, indicating responsive governance and stakeholder engagement on land-use decisions.

processing_notes: Article is announcement-focused with limited substantive detail about redevelopment scope, timeline, or budget
No specific dollar amounts, contractors, or project phases mentioned
Future date (2026-07-21) suggests forward planning notification
East Adams appears to be a neighborhood designation; recommend cross-reference with GIS and zoning datasets
